category_sources: Official GitHub README describes protobuf-c as a C implementation of Google's Protocol Buffers data serialization format.
source_facts.description says it is a Protocol buffers library.
display_name_sources: Official repository https://github.com/protobuf-c/protobuf-c uses the project name protobuf-c.
docs_sources: Official README points to online Doxygen documentation at https://protobuf-c.github.io/protobuf-c/.
source_facts.homepage points to the official GitHub repository.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already has https://github.com/protobuf-c/protobuf-c, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: Official README describes libprotobuf-c and the protoc-gen-c generator plugin.
source_facts.description identifies a Protocol Buffers library.
